name: @vitpos/mobile
description: VitPOS Mobile - Capacitor Android shell wrapping root web build

scripts.check: npm run check:config && npm run check:web-build
scripts.check:config: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('./capacitor.config.ts')) process.exit(1); const content = fs.readFileSync('./capacitor.config.ts', 'utf8'); if (!content.includes('appId: \'com.kotacom.vitpos\'')) process.exit(1); console.log('✓ Config valid')"
scripts.check:web-build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const distPath = path.resolve('../../dist/index.html'); if (!fs.existsSync(distPath)) { console.error('✗ Web build missing. Run: npm run build (from root)'); process.exit(1); } console.log('✓ Web build exists')"
scripts.build:android: npm run check && cap sync && cap copy android
scripts.prebuild: echo 'Run npm run build from project root first'
